data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for minimum purchase requirements.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the minimum purchase requirements, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of this requirement. The linked use case mentions minimum purchase requirements, but without direct evidence, the requirement remains unfulfilled. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as there is no supporting evidence to confirm or deny the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of minimum purchase requirements.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the minimum purchase requirements.
